Requests

A focused queue for floor work: assistance signals, bill follow-ups, and tasks routed to you.

Your request stream is almost ready

When managers link you to branches and provider task APIs go live, open guest requests will appear here with status and context — separate from merchant configuration screens.

  • Complete your profile so managers can recognize you in staffing tools.

    Review profile

  • Confirm your assignment with your manager — assignments unlock branch context.

    Assignments

  • You’ll see waiter calls, assistance requests, and dining signals here once wired.
